results.rendered_html:
viddha p. p. [vyadh-kta]
1 Pierced, penetrated; wounded, stabbed.
2 Beaten, whipped, lashed.
3 Thrown, directed, sent.
4 Opposed.
5 Resembling.
— ddhaṃ A wound.
Comp.
— karṇa a. having bored ears.
